about: Parabola Center is a nonprofit of legal, public health, and policy professionals coming together to put people over profits. Through research and education, we provide everyone with the tools and expertise to shape emerging fields, from marijuana to artificial intelligence.
card_three:
## Why We Do It

We make policy resources accessible to everyone, especially consumers, workers, and people impacted by the policies. In our experience, the more people who engage with policy, the better the results. We created Parabola Center so everyone can have the tools to be influential.
policy: Read our plan for federal cannabis legalization
card_four: From cannabis to AI: policy for people, not corporate greed.
card_one:
## Who We Are

We are a group of attorneys with the collective goal to keep the power over emerging industries — like cannabis and AI — with the people. With 20+ years of experience working in government, practicing law and serving the public, we are well equipped to support the individuals advocating for equitable policies that put people over corporate greed.
card_two:
## What We Do

Our team was the first in the nation to devise a clear path for small businesses and historically disenfranchised groups to enter the market. We are here to help create policies that reflect the needs of the millions of people shaping emerging industries — from the legal cannabis movement to the fights now defining AI.
